calls.query: const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,260p' AGENTS.md && sed -n '1,320p' .github/prompts/predict.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":40000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,320p' schemas/prediction.schema.json && sed -n '1,260p' schemas/agent_flags.schema.json && sed -n '1,260p' schemas/agent_tooling.schema.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":40000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73279966 --event evt-petition-disposition && find data/cases/scotus/73279966 -maxdepth 7 -type f -print | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73279966 --event evt-petition-disposition\nfind data/cases/scotus/73279966 -maxdepth 8 -type f -print | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,240p' data/cases/scotus/73279966/events/evt-petition-disposition/event.yaml
sed -n '1,320p' data/cases/scotus/73279966/record/snapshots/2026-07-16.json
sed -n '1,240p' data/cases/scotus/73279966/record/documents/documents.json
wc -l -w -c data/cases/scotus/73279966/record/documents/*.txt","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,220p' data/cases/scotus/73279966/record/documents/questions-presented.txt\nsed -n '1,520p' data/cases/scotus/73279966/record/documents/petition.txt\nsed -n '1,520p' data/cases/scotus/73279966/record/documents/brief-in-opposition.txt","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":40000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"rg -n \"^(REASONS FOR GRANTING|I\\.|II\\.|A\\.|B\\.|C\\.|CONCLUSION|INTRODUCTION|STATEMENT)\" data/cases/scotus/73279966/record/documents/petition.txt data/cases/scotus/73279966/record/documents/brief-in-opposition.txt","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":10000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '500,1525p' data/cases/scotus/73279966/record/documents/petition.txt\nsed -n '520,1400p' data/cases/scotus/73279966/record/documents/brief-in-opposition.txt\nsed -n '1,240p' data/cases/scotus/73279966/record/context.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":50000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"rg -n \"Modern discretionary|CVSG|salience band|Term 202|Ninth|9th|relist\" metrics/statpack.md | head -120\nsed -n '1,260p' metrics/statpack.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '260,620p' metrics/statpack.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"jq 'keys' metrics/statpack.json && jq '.. | objects | select(has(\"term\") and (.term == \"2025\"))' metrics/statpack.json | head -240","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"jq '.terms, (.sections | keys)' metrics/statpack.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --help","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":12000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --court scotus --era 2020s --citation '596 U.S. 832' --limit 8 --corpus-backend ranged 2>&1","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output);
const xs = ALL_TOOLS.filter(x => /courtlistener|citation|docket|search/i.test(x.name+" "+x.description)); text(xs);

const t = ALL_TOOLS.find(x=>x.name==="mcp__courtlistener__search"); if(!t){text("missing"); exit();} const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",q:"\"intergovernmental immunity\" \"federal contractor\" state regulation",court:["ca2","ca3","ca4"],filed_before:"2026-07-16",num_results:8,fields:["caseName","court_citation_string","dateFiled","citation","absolute_url","snippet"]}); for (const c of (r?.content||[])) { if (c.type==="text") text(c.text); }

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",case_name:"CoreCivic Governor New Jersey",court:["ca3"],filed_before:"2026-07-16",num_results:5,fields:["caseName","dateFiled","citation","absolute_url","opinions"]}); for (const c of (r?.content||[])) { if (c.type==="text") text(c.text); }

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '620,980p' data/cases/scotus/73279966/record/documents/brief-in-opposition.txt
sed -n '980,1185p' data/cases/scotus/73279966/record/documents/brief-in-opposition.txt
sed -n '900,1150p' data/cases/scotus/73279966/record/documents/petition.txt
sed -n '1430,1525p' data/cases/scotus/73279966/record/documents/petition.txt","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":45000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",case_name:"GEO Group Menocal",court:["scotus"],filed_before:"2026-07-16",num_results:5,fields:["caseName","dateFiled","citation","absolute_url","opinions"]}); for (const c of (r?.content||[])) { if (c.type==="text") text(c.text); }

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__get_endpoint_item({endpoint_id:"opinions",item_id:11266870,fields:["id","html_with_citations"]}); for (const c of (r?.content||[])) { if (c.type==="text") text(c.text); }

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"find data/cases/scotus/73279966/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions -maxdepth 3 -type f -print 2>/dev/null | sort\ndate -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":2000}); text(r.output);

const p = "data/cases/scotus/73279966/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260716T123618Z"; const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:`mkdir -p ${p}`,"workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":1000}); text(r.output);

const patch = "*** Begin Patch
*** Add File: data/cases/scotus/73279966/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260716T123618Z/prediction.json
+{
+  "schema_version": "1.0",

+  "run_id": "20260716T123618Z",
+  "created_at": "2026-07-16T12:40:07Z",
+  "input_snapshot": "d

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"jq empty data/cases/scotus/73279966/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260716T123618Z/*.json
UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts validate data
git status --short -- data/cases/scotus/73279966/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260716T123618Z
find data/cases/scotus/73279966/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260716T123618Z -maxdepth 1 -type f -printf '%f\n' | sort","w
